label: Roast Report Card
description: Rendered when a panelist has delivered a clear verdict on the target. A shareable card with score, one-line burn, and panelist attribution. Issue once, at the moment the roast lands — not on small talk, and not before the player has shared a target.

fields.name: target
fields.label: What was roasted — URL, phrase, or 'You'

fields.name: verdict
fields.label: One savage sentence — the pull quote on the card.

label: Clap-Back Battle Card
description: Issued at the end of a roast battle at the Clap-Back Bar. Records winner, both sides' strongest lines, and Vinny's final call. Issue once, after the battle has been called.

fields.name: best_line
fields.label: Player's strongest burn from the battle, verbatim

fields.name: opponent_line
fields.label: Vinny's strongest burn from the battle, verbatim

fields.name: verdict
fields.label: Vinny's final call — one short line

label: Burn Dojo — Sharpened
description: Awarded by Sensei Slim when the student finally lands a black-belt-level burn on a practice dummy. Records the rank earned, the winning line, and the technique they nailed. Issue once per session, only after a burn genuinely lands — not for a soft or white-belt attempt.

fields.name: technique
fields.label: The roasting principle they nailed — e.g. 'The twist', 'Specificity'
